description: Wisdom rules seeded at genre-proposal time from a successful reflection. Expected to be curated + extended via future LEARN.5 wisdom-rule proposals as sessions in this genre accumulate.

rules.rule: Endless runner games must have simple controls that allow for quick and responsive actions.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The game should feature escalating difficulty to maintain player engagement and challenge.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: A scoring system is essential, rewarding players for distance traveled and items collected.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Visual feedback, such as flashes or animations, should be used to indicate milestones or player failure.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The game environment should be visually engaging with a retro arcade aesthetic to enhance the experience.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre
